name: fix-bundle-cache-corruption
description: Fix Bundler loading old gems from wrong Ruby version causing cache corruption
error: Bundler mixing gems from different Ruby versions, gem load errors for previously installed packages
solution: Delete vendor/bundle and Gemfile.lock, re-run bundle install with correct Ruby path
when_to_use:
When bundle install or bundle exec shows gems from wrong Ruby version,
or you see gem loading errors after switching Ruby versions
